summary: Iteration 31: BIQC Sovereign Prompt Lab feature COMPLETE. All 9 backend tests passed. 5 admin endpoints verified to return 403 without auth (super_admin gated). Frontend pages load correctly: landing (/), login (/login-supabase), and /admin/prompt-lab redirects to login (ProtectedRoute working). All data-testid attributes present in PromptLab.js (12) and AdminDashboard.js (12) including prompt-lab-page and prompt-lab-link.
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 Prompt Lab admin endpoints correctly gated with Depends(get_super_admin): GET /admin/prompts, GET /admin/prompts/{key}, PUT /admin/prompts/{key}, POST /admin/prompts/{key}/test, POST /admin/prompts/invalidate

PromptLab.js has comprehensive data-testid coverage: prompt-lab-page, invalidate-all-btn, prompt-search-input, prompt-row-*, test-btn-*, prompt-editor-drawer, prompt-description-input, prompt-version-input, prompt-content-editor, prompt-test-btn, prompt-save-btn
AdminDashboard.js includes prompt-lab-link data-testid for quick access card
ProtectedRoute with adminOnly correctly gates /admin/prompt-lab route in App.js
PUT /admin/prompts/{key} creates audit log entry in prompt_audit_logs table (line 198-209)
Cache invalidation properly integrated with save flow (line 79 in PromptLab.js)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Prompt Lab feature fully implemented and tested. Admin endpoints gated with get_super_admin dependency. PromptLab.js at /admin/prompt-lab with ProtectedRoute adminOnly. AdminDashboard.js has quick-access card with data-testid='prompt-lab-link'. All audit logging implemented in PUT /admin/prompts/{key}.

frontend_pages.landing_page: PASS - BIQC branding, Start monitoring button
frontend_pages.admin_prompt_lab_route: PASS - Exists (returns 200 HTML), redirects to login when unauthenticated
